facebook.caption: Locals don't post about this breakfast spot. Hồ Bơi Cafe Nam Anh sits off the tourist trail in Phu Quoc and the regulars want to keep it that way. 4.8 stars. Only 31 reviews. That ratio tells you everything. Show up early, order whatever they're eating at the next table, and thank us later. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what a Phu Quoc local breakfast actually looks like. Hồ Bơi Cafe Nam Anh. 4.8 stars. Barely anyone knows it exists. Your itinerary needs this.

instagram.video_caption: The Phu Quoc breakfast spot with 4.8 stars and zero tourist crowds. Hồ Bơi Cafe Nam Anh. Go early.
